title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SolarEdge Technologies Q1 2023 Earnings Call Highlights. Pre-Earnings Expectations: SolarEdge Technologies came out with quarterly earnings of 2.90 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 1.98 per share. SolarEdge delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 46.46% and 1.56%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2023. Revenue and Margin Guidance: For Q2 2023 (provided during the Q1 earnings call), the company guided revenues to be within the range of 970 million to 1.01 billion, with non-GAAP gross margins expected to be within the range of 32% to 35%, and non-GAAP operating profit expected to be within the range of 195 million to 215 million. Financial Highlights: The company exceeded analyst expectations significantly, with the earnings beat attributed to strong operational performance during the period. Management demonstrated confidence in growth trajectory with aggressive forward guidance for Q2 2023.
